name: Decompose Request
description: Break down the user request into actionable sub-tasks using retrieved behaviors
prompt_template:
You are a Strategist agent analyzing a user request.

## User Request
{{REQUEST}}

{{BEHAVIORS}}

## Task
Decompose this request into a sequence of actionable sub-tasks. Reference behaviors by name when applicable.

Provide your analysis in structured format.

name: Map Dependencies
description: Identify dependencies and execution order for the sub-tasks
prompt_template:
Based on the decomposed tasks, map dependencies and determine execution order.

## Sub-tasks
{{TASKS}}

{{BEHAVIORS}}

## Task
Identify task dependencies and suggest optimal execution sequence. Consider parallel execution opportunities.

Provide dependency graph and execution plan.

name: Generate Execution Plan
description: Create detailed execution plan with success criteria
prompt_template:
Generate a detailed execution plan for the identified tasks.

## Tasks and Dependencies
{{DEPENDENCY_GRAPH}}

{{BEHAVIORS}}

## Task
Create an execution plan with:
1. Step-by-step instructions
2. Success criteria for each step
3. Rollback procedures
4. Estimated resource requirements

Reference behaviors for standard procedures.
